sentences.translation: Jedna porodica je živjela pored mora.
sentences.translationEn: A family lived beside the sea.

sentences.arabic: كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ كَانَ الأَبُ يَصْطَادُ السَّمَكَ وَيَعُودُ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro otac je lovio ribu i vraćao se s njom.
sentences.translationEn: Every morning the father fished and came back with it.

sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ الأَطْفَالُ الْجُلُوسَ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ وَمَدَّ الشِّبَاكِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su voljela sjediti na plaži i rastezati mreže.
sentences.translationEn: The children loved sitting on the shore and spreading the nets.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَسَاءِ أَكَلَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ السَّمَكَ مَعًا بِسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uveče je porodica sretno zajedno jela ribu.
sentences.translationEn: In the evening the family ate fish together happily.
